languages.text: Звонкий голос Ведки на миг стал столь отчаянным, что перекрыл собой смертельную песнь гробницы. Заслышав его, зарковцы мгновенно вышли из оцепенения. Солдаты вскакивали один за одним, сжимая зубы и утирая кровь, выступившую из ушей, — подхватывали и несли тех, кто уже не мог идти сам. Стоицизм поколений, веками выживавших в пустошах мира-фронтира, сделал их сопротивление страху незыблемым.

For a moment, the sheer desperation in Vedka's sonorous voice overcame even the crypt's deadly dirge. Hearing it jolted the Zarkovians out of their stupor at once. One after another, the soldiers jumped to their feet, clenching their teeth and wiping off the blood that seeped from their ears. They picked up and carried those who could no longer walk. The stoicism of the generations who had survived in the badlands of a frontier world for centuries had imbued them with an unshakeable resistance to fear.
languages.original_text: Звонкий голос Ведки на миг стал столь отчаянным, что перекрыл собой смертельную песнь гробницы. Заслышав его, зарковцы мгновенно вышли из оцепенения. Солдаты вскакивали один за одним, сжимая зубы и утирая кровь, выступившую из ушей, — подхватывали и несли тех, кто уже не мог идти сам. Стоицизм поколений, веками выживавших в пустошах мира-фронтира, сделал их сопротивление страху незыблемым.

traits.locale_text: For a moment, the sheer desperation in Vedka's sonorous voice drowned out the crypt's deadly dirge. Hearing it jolted the Zarkovians out of their stupor at once. One after another, the soldiers jumped to their feet, clenching their teeth and wiping off the blood that seeped from their ears. They picked up and carried those who could no longer walk. The calm fortitude of generations of frontier-world dwellers who had survived in its badlands for centuries had imbued them with an unshakable resistance to fear.

For a moment, the sheer desperation in Vedka's sonorous voice drowned out the crypt's deadly dirge. Hearing it jolted the Zarkovians out of their stupor at once. One after another, the soldiers jumped to their feet, clenching their teeth and wiping off the blood that seeped from their ears. They picked up and carried those who could no longer walk. The calm fortitude of generations of frontier-world dwellers who had survived in its badlands for centuries had imbued them with an unshakable resistance to fear.

For a moment, the sheer desperation in Vedka's sonorous voice overcame even the crypt's deadly dirge. Hearing it jolted the Zarkovians out of their stupor at once. One after another, the soldiers jumped to their feet, clenching their teeth and wiping off the blood that seeped from their ears. They picked up and carried those who could no longer walk. The stoicism of the generations who had survived in the badlands of a frontier world for centuries had imbued them with an unshakable resistance to fear.

For a moment, the sheer desperation in Vedka's sonorous voice overcame even the crypt's deadly dirge. Hearing it jolted the Zarkovians out of their stupor at once. One after another, the soldiers jumped to their feet, clenching their teeth and wiping off the blood that seeped from their ears. They picked up and carried those who could no longer walk. The stoicism of the generations who had survived in the badlands of a frontier world for centuries had imbued them with an unshakable resistance to fear.

languages.text: Por un momento, la desesperación absoluta de la voz de Vedka logró sobreponerse al letal clamor de la cripta y sacó a los zarkovianos de su estupor. Uno tras otro, los soldados se pusieron en pie, apretando los dientes y secándose la sangre de los oídos. Levantaron a los que ya no podían andar y cargaron con ellos. El estoicismo de las generaciones que habían sobrevivido durante siglos en las tierras baldías de un mundo fronterizo les había otorgado una resistencia inquebrantable al miedo.
languages.original_text: For a moment, the sheer desperation in Vedka's sonorous voice overcame even the crypt's deadly dirge. Hearing it jolted the Zarkovians out of their stupor at once. One after another, the soldiers jumped to their feet, clenching their teeth and wiping off the blood that seeped from their ears. They picked up and carried those who could no longer walk. The stoicism of the generations who had survived in the badlands of a frontier world for centuries had imbued them with an unshakable resistance to fear.

traits.locale_text: Por un momento, la desesperación absoluta de la voz de Vedka logró sobreponerse al letal clamor de la cripta y sacó a los zarkovianos de su estupor. Uno tras otro, los soldados se pusieron en pie, apretando los dientes y secándose la sangre de los oídos. Levantaron a los que ya no podían andar y cargaron con ellos. El estoicismo de las generaciones que habían sobrevivido durante siglos en las tierras baldías de un mundo fronterizo les había otorgado una resistencia inquebrantable al miedo.

languages.text: L'espace d'un instant, le désespoir profond qui transparaissait dans la voix sonore de Vedka couvrit même le chant funèbre de la crypte, tirant aussitôt les Zarkoviens de leur torpeur. Les uns après les autres, les soldats se relevèrent d'un bond, serrant les dents et essuyant le sang qui coulait de leurs oreilles, aidant de leur mieux ceux qui ne pouvaient plus marcher. Après avoir survécu des siècles durant sur les terres inhospitalières d'un monde frontalier, ils semblaient insensibles à la peur.
languages.original_text: For a moment, the sheer desperation in Vedka's sonorous voice overcame even the crypt's deadly dirge. Hearing it jolted the Zarkovians out of their stupor at once. One after another, the soldiers jumped to their feet, clenching their teeth and wiping off the blood that seeped from their ears. They picked up and carried those who could no longer walk. The stoicism of the generations who had survived in the badlands of a frontier world for centuries had imbued them with an unshakeable resistance to fear.

traits.locale_text: L'espace d'un instant, le désespoir profond qui transparaissait dans la voix sonore de Vedka couvrit même le chant funèbre de la crypte, tirant aussitôt les Zarkoviens de leur torpeur. Les uns après les autres, les soldats se relevèrent d'un bond, serrant les dents et essuyant le sang qui coulait de leurs oreilles, aidant de leur mieux ceux qui ne pouvaient plus marcher. Après avoir survécu des siècles durant sur les terres inhospitalières d'un monde frontalier, ils semblaient insensibles à la peur.

languages.text: 有那么一刻，薇德卡铿锵的声音中透出的绝望，甚至压过了墓穴的致命挽歌。这吼声立刻将扎尔科夫人从恍惚中惊醒。士兵们一个接一个地跃起。他们咬紧牙关，抹去从耳中渗出的鲜血，又扶起、扛走了那些再也无力行走的人。几代人于边境世界的恶土上挣扎求生，从而洗礼出来的这份坚忍，让他们在面对恐惧时无可动摇。
languages.original_text: For a moment, the sheer desperation in Vedka's sonorous voice overcame even the crypt's deadly dirge. Hearing it jolted the Zarkovians out of their stupor at once. One after another, the soldiers jumped to their feet, clenching their teeth and wiping off the blood that seeped from their ears. They picked up and carried those who could no longer walk. The stoicism of the generations who had survived in the badlands of a frontier world for centuries had imbued them with an unshakeable resistance to fear.

traits.locale_text: 有那么一刻，薇德卡铿锵的声音中透出的绝望，甚至压过了墓穴的致命挽歌。这吼声立刻将扎尔科夫人从恍惚中惊醒。士兵们一个接一个地跃起。他们咬紧牙关，抹去从耳中渗出的鲜血，又扶起、扛走了那些再也无力行走的人。几代人于边境世界的恶土上挣扎求生，从而洗礼出来的这份坚忍，让他们在面对恐惧时无可动摇。

languages.text: Einen Augenblick lang überwand die schiere Verzweiflung in Vedkas klangvoller Stimme selbst den tödlichen Leichengesang der Krypta. Sein Klang riss die Zarkovianer sofort aus ihrer Lethargie. Einer nach dem anderen sprangen die Soldaten auf, bissen die Zähne zusammen und wischten sich das aus ihren Ohren sickernde Blut ab. Wer selbst nicht mehr gehen konnte, wurde von ihnen getragen. Der Stoizismus der Generationen, die seit Jahrhunderten im Ödland einer Grenzwelt überlebt hatten, hatte sie mit einer unerschütterlichen Furchtlosigkeit beseelt.
languages.original_text: For a moment, the sheer desperation in Vedka's sonorous voice overcame even the crypt's deadly dirge. Hearing it jolted the Zarkovians out of their stupor at once. One after another, the soldiers jumped to their feet, clenching their teeth and wiping off the blood that seeped from their ears. They picked up and carried those who could no longer walk. The stoicism of the generations who had survived in the badlands of a frontier world for centuries had imbued them with an unshakeable resistance to fear.

Wer selbst nicht mehr gehen konnte, wurde von ihnen getragen. Der Stoizismus der Generationen, die seit Jahrhunderten im Ödland einer Grenzwelt überlebt hatten, hatte sie mit einer unerschütterlichen Furchtlosigkeit beseelt.

languages.text: Vedka'nın gür sesindeki mutlak çaresizlik, bir an için mahzenin ölümcül ağıdını bile bastırdı. Bunu duymak, Zarkovluları anında sarsarak kendilerine getirdi. Askerler birbiri ardına ayağa fırladı, dişlerini sıktı ve kulaklarından sızan kanı sildi. Artık yürüyemeyenleri alıp taşıdılar. Yüzyıllar boyunca bir sınır dünyasının çorak topraklarında hayatta kalan nesillerin metaneti, onlara korkuya karşı sarsılmaz bir direnç aşılamıştı.
languages.original_text: For a moment, the sheer desperation in Vedka's sonorous voice overcame even the crypt's deadly dirge. Hearing it jolted the Zarkovians out of their stupor at once. One after another, the soldiers jumped to their feet, clenching their teeth and wiping off the blood that seeped from their ears. They picked up and carried those who could no longer walk. The stoicism of the generations who had survived in the badlands of a frontier world for centuries had imbued them with an unshakeable resistance to fear.

traits.locale_text: Vedka'nın gür sesindeki mutlak çaresizlik, bir an için mahzenin ölümcül ağıdını bile bastırdı. Bunu duymak, Zarkovluları anında sarsarak kendilerine getirdi. Askerler birbiri ardına ayağa fırladı, dişlerini sıktı ve kulaklarından sızan kanı sildi. Artık yürüyemeyenleri alıp taşıdılar. Yüzyıllar boyunca bir sınır dünyasının çorak topraklarında hayatta kalan nesillerin metaneti, onlara korkuya karşı sarsılmaz bir direnç aşılamıştı.

languages.text: ヴェドカの雄々しい声の絶望が、墓所の死の哀歌を一瞬凌駕した。その声に、ザルコビアンの兵士たちは、その場に立ち尽くしていた。次々と兵士たちは立ち上がり、歯を食いしばり、耳から滲み出る血を拭い去った。そして、歩けなくなった兵士たちを担いだ。悪土の荒野で何世紀にも渡って生き延びてきたザルコビアンの兵士たちは、恐怖に
